items.text:
Notice: Campus Mailroom Holiday Hours

Please be advised that the Campus Mailroom in Harmon Hall will operate on reduced hours during the Thanksgiving break, from November 24 through November 28. During this period, the following schedule will be observed:

- Monday and Tuesday: 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM
- Wednesday through Friday: Closed

Packages that are not collected by November 22 will be moved to secure storage. A $3 daily fee will be charged for any parcel that remains uncollected for more than five business days. Students who are expecting time-sensitive deliveries are encouraged to arrange an alternative drop-off location. Regular hours will resume on Monday, December 1. Questions may be directed to the Facilities Office at extension 4400.

questions.stem: According to the notice, when will the mailroom be open during the break?
questions.explanation: The schedule lists Monday and Tuesday from 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM as open; Wednesday through Friday are closed.

questions.stem: What is charged for a parcel left uncollected for more than five business days?
questions.explanation: The notice states that a $3 daily fee is charged for any parcel uncollected for more than five business days.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students expecting urgent deliveries during the break?

options.A: They will be given free shipping
options.B: They should use another drop-off spot
options.C: They must pay a mailroom deposit

questions.explanation: Because the mailroom is largely closed, the notice encourages students expecting time-sensitive deliveries to arrange an alternative drop-off location.
